task_completion.description: Verify that the required layers are created with the correct colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the LibreCAD layer list panel, there should be three specific layers: 'WALLS' (White/Color 7), 'ROOF_LINES' (Cyan/Color 4), and 'NOTES' (Yellow/Color 2).

task_completion.description: Verify that the L-shaped wall outline is drawn.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the main drawing area, there should be an L-shaped closed polygon drawn in white, representing the building's outer walls.

task_completion.description: Verify that the hip roof geometry is constructed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the main drawing area, there should be cyan lines representing the roof structure. This includes diagonal hip lines from the five outer corners, a diagonal valley line from the inner corner, and horizontal/vertical ridge lines connecting them.

task_completion.description: Verify that the text annotations are added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The words 'VALLEY' and 'RIDGE' should be visible on the drawing in yellow text, placed near their respective roof features.

task_completion.description: Verify that the file is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD window title bar or a save dialog should display the filename 'hip_roof_plan.dxf'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the LibreCAD GUI to create the drawing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LibreCAD interface being actively used, rather than a terminal or text editor writing DXF code directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the drawing tools were used.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show toolbars, command line inputs within LibreCAD, or drawing crosshairs indicating manual or command-based drafting within the application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The building is an L-shape defined by 6 corners. The wall outline must be on the 'WALLS' layer. The roof geometry on the 'ROOF_LINES' layer must include a valley line starting from the inner corner of the L-shape at a 45-degree angle, hip lines from the 5 outer corners at 45-degree angles, and ridge lines connecting these features. The text 'VALLEY' and 'RIDGE' must be on the 'NOTES' layer. The file must be saved as 'hip_roof_plan.dxf'.
